# Market Data All Classes

> Comprehensive market data products across all asset classes (equities, derivatives, fixed-income, indices, commodities, currencies)

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** market-data · eod · nlmd · all-classes · comprehensive

## What this does

Comprehensive market data products across all asset classes (equities, derivatives, fixed-income, indices, commodities, currencies)

Specifies 1 acceptance outcome that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **asset_class** *(select, required)* — Asset Class
- **product_code** *(text, required)* — Product Code
- **distribution_date** *(date, required)* — Distribution Date
- **record_format** *(select, optional)* — Format (FixedWidth, Delimited, Binary)

## What must be true

- **coverage → data_completeness:** All markets publish EOD data for all trading instruments
- **coverage → historical_retention:** Minimum 5-year retention for regulatory compliance
- **coverage → format_standardization:** All products use exchange-standard formats

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Publish Market Data Eod** — when asset_class exists, then emit market_data.published. _Why: Publish EOD market data across all asset classes._

## Errors it can return

- `MARKET_DATA_PUBLISH_FAILED` — Market data publication failed

## Events

**`market_data.published`**
  Payload: `asset_class`, `product_code`, `publication_date`

## Connects to

- **index-data-feeds** *(extends)*
- **reference-data-management** *(required)*
- **bond-pricing-models** *(recommended)*
